message: docs: rebuild CHANGELOG.md from git history with live commit links

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
 
 [dependencies]
 # Core Asupersync runtime (no wasm-bindgen in core paths).
-asupersync = { version = "0.2.8", path = "..", default-features = false }
+asupersync = { version = "0.2.9", path = "..", default-features = false }
 
 # WASM boundary tooling.
 wasm-bindgen = "0.2"
